metadata.content_note: Production Grade 5 Reading Comprehension SkillPackage with real passages, full voice metadata, and complete level banks.

subject: English
skill: Quote Accurately and Use Text Evidence

lesson.story_mission: Join Evidence Trail Base Camp, where readers earn badges by proving every answer with exact words from the text.
lesson.objective: I can quote accurately from a text and answer literal and inferential questions using relevant evidence.
lesson.concept_explanation: Strong Grade 5 readers answer questions by returning to the text. Literal questions are answered directly by stated details. Inferential questions require clues plus thinking. A quote copies the author’s words exactly, and an explanation tells how that evidence proves the answer.
lesson.common_misconception: A reader may answer from memory, make an inference without evidence, copy a quote inaccurately, or choose a sentence that does not prove the answer.
lesson.real_world_connection: Text evidence helps you discuss books, write reading responses, support research notes, and explain ideas in every subject.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read the question, find the answer or clues, quote accurate and relevant words, then explain how the evidence supports the answer.
lesson.mini_lesson: Use A-Q-E: Answer the question, Quote accurate evidence, and Explain the connection. If the question asks for exact words, copy them carefully and use quotation marks when you write them.

misconception_bank.inaccurate_quote: The quoted evidence must copy the author’s words exactly and include only the needed words.
misconception_bank.misses_text_evidence: The response gives an answer but does not include evidence that proves it.

game_theme.title: Evidence Trail Base Camp
game_theme.name: Evidence Trail Base Camp
game_theme.mission_intro: Read short passages, gather relevant evidence, and build answers that quote the text accurately.
game_theme.setting: A mountain trail where every clue marker is a sentence from the passage.

story.text: Welcome to Evidence Trail Base Camp. Today you will read short Grade 5 passages and prove your answers with exact words from the text. Press Start Mission, use Listen for passages, and remember that every strong answer leaves a trail back to the author’s words.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: Read This Page to learn the evidence routine. First read the question, then reread the passage, then choose or copy evidence that proves the answer. Press Next when you can tell the difference between a stated detail, an inference, and an accurate quote.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: Watch the model response. Step one: answer the question. Step two: quote the exact words that prove it. Step three: explain how the quote supports the answer, so the final answer is clear and text based. Press Next to see the demo.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: Read This Page for the demo. Notice how the answer, quotation, and explanation are connected like three links in a chain. Use Listen to hear the passage and evidence example before you press Next.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: Practice with support. Press Read Question before answering, use Listen for the passage, and choose evidence that is relevant instead of just interesting. Use the hint if your answer is not supported by the text.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: Challenge time. Press Read Question, reread the passage carefully, and make an inference only when the evidence supports it. Accurate quotes should copy the author’s wording exactly.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: Checkpoint shows what you can do independently. Press Read Question, answer carefully, and include the best evidence. If you miss text evidence, go back to the hint and reread the key sentence.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: You earned the Evidence Trail Badge by using literal details, inferences, quotations, and explanations. Read This Page, celebrate your progress, then press Next to review your profile.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: Your profile records this Skill World mission. You can go back to the hub or choose Practice This Skill to open the Skill Practice Center with Literal Questions, Inferential Questions, Quote Text Evidence, Explain With Evidence, and Mixed.
profile.label: Read This Page
